_source: WM/GS cap 67626 verified 2026-06-22 from per-event mod capture (DAMAGE_HOOK re-enabled). Real boss CB receives WM procs at exactly 67,626 damage (observed across Mane/Demy/Ninja/Geo/Venom on Force UNM). Previous 75K was the cap at extraction time 2026-05-01 but Plarium appears to have tuned it down at some patch since. HP Burn cap stays 75K (verified same capture: 38 events at 75K from Ninja+Geo HP burns). Poison caps unchanged.
